scripts.dev: pnpm run build:preload && pnpm run build:main-dev && pnpm exec concurrently "pnpm run dev:renderer" "pnpm run wait:renderer && pnpm run dev:main"
scripts.dev:main: OPENCLAW_RAW_STREAM=1 OPENCLAW_PAYLOAD_LOG=1 OPENCLAW_PAYLOAD_LOG_PROVIDERS=google-antigravity,openai-codex NODE_ENV=development pnpm exec electron dist/main-dev.js
scripts.dev:prod: pnpm run build && OPENCLAW_RAW_STREAM=1 OPENCLAW_PAYLOAD_LOG=1 OPENCLAW_PAYLOAD_LOG_PROVIDERS=google-antigravity,openai-codex NODE_ENV=production pnpm exec electron .
scripts.build: pnpm run build:preload && pnpm run build:main && pnpm run build:renderer
scripts.pack:dmg: pnpm run prepare:openclaw-deps && pnpm run prepare:node -- --platform mac --arch arm64 && pnpm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false BUSTLY_UPDATE_PLATFORM=mac BUSTLY_UPDATE_ARCH=arm64 PUBLISH_URL=$(node scripts/resolve-publish-url.js) pnpm dlx electron-builder --mac dmg --arm64 --publish=always -c.publish.provider=generic -c.publish.url=$PUBLISH_URL -c.mac.identity=null -c.directories.output=dist/electron/mac-arm64
scripts.pack:dmg:x64: pnpm run prepare:openclaw-deps && pnpm run prepare:node -- --platform mac --arch x64 && pnpm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false BUSTLY_UPDATE_PLATFORM=mac BUSTLY_UPDATE_ARCH=x64 PUBLISH_URL=$(node scripts/resolve-publish-url.js) pnpm dlx electron-builder --mac dmg --x64 --publish=always -c.publish.provider=generic -c.publish.url=$PUBLISH_URL -c.mac.identity=null -c.directories.output=dist/electron/mac-x64

extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: Bustly needs camera access for media capture and camera-based workflows.
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Bustly needs microphone access for voice input and audio capture.
extendInfo.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Bustly needs photo library access to read images you choose to share.
extendInfo.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Bustly needs photo library add access to save generated or edited media.
extendInfo.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Bustly needs calendar access to read and create calendar events on your behalf.
extendInfo.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Bustly needs full calendar access to read, create, and edit events on your behalf.
extendInfo.NSCalendarsWriteOnlyAccessUsageDescripti: Bustly needs write access to create calendar events on your behalf.
extendInfo.NSContactsUsageDescription: Bustly needs contacts access for contact-aware workflows you explicitly request.
extendInfo.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Bustly needs location access when in use for location-aware tasks you request.
extendInfo.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Bustly needs access to Reminders to create and manage your reminder tasks.
extendInfo.NSRemindersFullAccessUsageDescription: Bustly needs full access to Reminders to create, edit, and complete your reminder tasks.
extendInfo.NSRemindersWriteOnlyAccessUsageDescripti: Bustly needs write access to Reminders to add tasks on your behalf.
extendInfo.NSAppleEventsUsageDescription: Bustly may use Apple Events to integrate with Apple apps, including Reminders.
